channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging & falling branches, 11th March
item.description:
All of the large chestnut trees on park road need to be pruned. This hasn’t been done for years. In windy conditions branches break and fall. There is parking below some of the trees along the road so cars can be damaged. It would improve the health and prolong life of the trees
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste left on the path, 11th March
item.description:
Sofas and a large amount of house hold rubbish left on the road by the garages
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sennen Walk, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Montain of mix trash, 11th March
item.description:
Mountain of trash on the middle of the driveway of a parking spot, this is now attracting pest, we need a crew to come amd clear it. The mix trash is located on parking of oxley close, between 130 to 154. Oxley close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxley Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White BMW parked over white markings 111 Burnt Ash Hill, 11th March
item.description:
There is a white BMW parked across the driveway at 111 Burnt Ash Hill which is blocking exit for the residents. Safety issue as vulnerable people inside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Burnt Ash Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Communal bins area full of domestic waste, 11th March
item.description:
Communal bins at 180 to 218 High Road were not emptied this week. Every rubbish point is now full and overflowing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on County Grove, 11th March
item.description:
Cardboard boxes and rubbish bags dumped on County Grove. The road has quite a bit of litter on the Knatchbull Road and, could it be swept up please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
